---
title: "Predictions"
subtitle: "Today, upcoming matches, bracket projections, and post-match model review."
description: "World Cup 2026 static match predictions with advance probabilities, regulation-level draw probabilities, expected scores, model performance, and a mobile-friendly bracket."
image: ../assets/social-preview.png
toc: false
number-sections: false
code-tools: false
code-fold: false
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
root <- if (file.exists("data/processed/modeling")) "." else ".."
source(file.path(root, "R", "report_helpers.R"))
source(file.path(root, "R", "matchday_components.R"))
source(file.path(root, "R", "static_readability_overrides.R"))
bundle <- load_matchday_bundle(root)
board <- bundle$board
summary <- bundle$summary
```

<section class="page-intro prediction-intro">
  <span class="section-kicker">Matchday</span>
  <h1>Prediction Board</h1>
  <p>Today&apos;s matches, next kickoff, bracket view, and model review in one place.</p>
</section>

```{r status, results="asis"}
cat('<section class="prediction-status-bar" aria-label="Prediction status">')
cat('<span class="status-chip">Beta</span>')
cat('<span class="status-chip">', escape_html(tournament_phase(summary)), '</span>', sep = "")
cat('<span class="status-chip muted">Last updated ', escape_html(summary_value(summary, "last_refreshed_local")), '</span>', sep = "")
cat('<span class="status-chip muted">Times shown in your local timezone when available</span>')
cat('</section>')
```

```{r market-board, results="asis"}
cat(render_model_market_board(
  board,
  title = "Model Market Board",
  subtitle = "A sportsbook-style scan of the current slate and the next available matches.",
  limit = 10,
  section_id = "model-board"
))
```

```{r today, results="asis"}
cat(render_today_section(board, summary))
```

```{r next-match, results="asis"}
cat(render_next_match_section(board))
```

```{r upcoming, results="asis"}
cat(render_upcoming_section(board, limit = 12))
```

<nav class="prediction-page-nav" aria-label="Prediction page sections">
  <a href="#model-board">Board</a>
  <a href="#today">Today</a>
  <a href="#next-match">Next match</a>
  <a href="#bracket">Bracket</a>
  <a href="#model-review">Model review</a>
  <a href="#model-comparison">Model lab</a>
  <a href="#dictionary">Guide</a>
</nav>

```{r command-center, results="asis"}
cat(render_forecast_command_center(bundle, board, compact = TRUE))
cat(render_model_suite_strip(bundle, compact = TRUE, base_path = "10_model_challengers.html"))
```

```{r static-note, results="asis"}
cat(render_static_api_note(summary, compact = TRUE))
```

## Tournament Bracket {#bracket}

```{r bracket, results="asis"}
cat(render_bracket(root))
```

```{r champion-outlook, results="asis"}
cat(render_champion_section(bundle, compact = FALSE))
```

```{r accuracy, results="asis"}
cat(render_model_review_section(bundle, compact = FALSE, limit = 12))
cat(render_tuning_watch_section(bundle, compact = FALSE, limit = 8))
cat(render_model_signal_section(bundle, compact = FALSE))
cat(render_performance_section(bundle, compact = FALSE))
cat(render_challenger_section(bundle, compact = FALSE))
```

## Methodology Details {#methodology-details}

```{r methodology, results="asis"}
cat(render_data_source_section(bundle))
cat(render_methodology_short())
cat(render_technical_prediction_table(board))
```

```{r dictionary, results="asis"}
cat(render_forecast_dictionary_section())
```

<p class="responsible-note">Forecasts are probabilistic and should be used for research, discussion, and model review. They are not financial advice or guaranteed betting edges.</p>
